extraction.one_line_summary: POGACAR attacked solo with 28km remaining after multiple accelerations shattered the lead group, winning by 38 seconds over HEALY.
tactical_patterns: UAE Emirates controlled race from 100km out, neutralizing breakaway before Pogacar's move, revealing pre-planned solo strategy.
Pogacar deliberately requested bike change while in lead group, using mechanical as tactical reset before decisive acceleration.
Decisive selection happened through repeated accelerations in lead group before final 28km solo move, not single climb attack.
Pidcock couldn't maintain chase on climbs but closed gap on flatter sections, exposing pure climbing power deficit to Pogacar.

rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: positive: Controlled race through team pacing, then shredded elite lead group with 28km solo ride, 38-second winning margin
rider_signals.HEALY Ben: positive: Second place from breakaway, maintained chase better than Pidcock on climbs, confirmed Brabantse Pijl form not fluke
rider_signals.PIDCOCK Tom: neutral: Strong enough for lead group but distanced on climbs, only closed gap on flatter Cauberg section
rider_signals.TRENTIN Matteo: negative: Did massive work for UAE but abandoned effort before decisive phase, poor pacing or team miscommunication
rider_signals.LITSENKO Oleksandr: negative: Won Sicily week prior but had nothing left for finale after making lead group
